entry.title: Re: Use of Sequence into SAP B1 / SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi @ANKIT_CHAUHAN ,

Thanks for sharing details.

It is compulsory to setup the sequence module / series? Without it can we use the SAP? What is the main purpose of it? 

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Re: SAP metadata export
entry.content:
Read the help guide for using the BI RESTful SDK
https://help.sap.com/doc/2534ba1cbc6f433595e8582045503bcb/4.3.4/en-US/sbo43sp2_webi_restful_web_service_sdk_en.pdf

to call RESTfull from VBA. If you search the internet you will find many examples
here is one of them

Option Explicit

Sub Test_LateBinding()

    Dim objRequest As Object
    Dim strUrl As String
    Dim blnAsync As Boolean
    Dim strResponse As String

    Set objRequest = CreateObject("MSXML2.XMLHTTP")
    strUrl = "https://<server>:<port>/<1>"
    blnAsync = True

    With objRequest
        .Open "GET", strUrl, blnAsync
        .SetRequestHeader "Content-Type", "application/json"
        .Send
        'spin wheels whilst waiting for response
        While objRequest.readyState <> 4
            DoEvents
        Wend
        strResponse = .ResponseText
    End With

    Debug.Print strResponse

End Sub

entry.title: Re: Quick start guides to get oriented with
entry.content:
Any response to my comment from 8.10.2023? Thanks in advance! 😍

Thanks for fast response @David_Chaviano , I am thinking about how to use these materials in Czech Republic.
Do you do some courses to teach teachers or SAP Next-Gen 4 ALL community members how to use them in lectures? 
For me it looks like without prior knowledge of chosen technology it is hardly to be used in teaching.

entry.title: Re: How can I use Launchpad Notifications with a RAP App?
entry.content: Thanks for the input. So far I'm finding that notifications in Launchpad are more complicated to develop than entire transactional RAP apps. I would have expected to be able to easily build notifications with CDS views or something like that.

entry.title: Re: Migrating Workflows to Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Gabriel,

Thank you for reaching out to us. I recommend you follow the step-by-step guide below to migrate from Workflow Management to SAP Build Process Automation.https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/transition-your-sap-workflow-management-solutio...

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/migrate-your-sap-btp-neo-workflow-applications-...In case you encounter any issues, please don't hesitate to let us know.

entry.title: Re: Deserialize JSON in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out to us. Are you still experiencing any issues? If so, have you tried creating a new data type and mapping it with a new variable to extract the data?

Please let us know if the issue persists.

entry.title: Re: BAdI: how to know what they are for without dev knowl...
entry.content:
Hi Luis,

This answer is for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition as you can't use transaction SE38 in public cloud.

If you use the Fiori app "Custom Logic" the system will show you all available BAdlns.

Click on "Create"

You can now see all available

Then you can click on the "View documentation"  to see how you can use it

I provided below the example of "Production Version Proposal"

I hope this info helps,

Marco

entry.title: Re: BPA Automation doesnt stop running,
entry.content: Hello Mateos, Thank you for reaching out to us. Could you please share a screenshot of your Agent Status? It would be helpful to cross-check the Agent Mode and test again. If the issue persists, please verify the Manage Attribute settings and ensure that your agent is correctly added in Agent Management for your environment. Let us know if you need further assistance.

entry.title: Re: SAC - Widget with separate filters
entry.content: Hi William, thanks for the reply. Yes I think this can works. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAC - Widget with separate filters
entry.content: Hi Denis, thanks for the exaustive reply. Yes I think It can works also this. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
Products in CPQ – BRIM S/4 Solution Quotation Integration
entry.content:
CPQ public cloud and S/4 Solution Quotation private cloud is very popular integration amongst SAP customers as it offers best of these both worlds enabling the customer’s sales team to create efficient quotes at a faster pace, negotiate the price and seal the deal.

The Master Data – Products and Business Partners in this integration plays a key role and it is imperative to understand the same for efficient process management. Let us look at the Products in this post.

 

  1. Leading system for Product creation in this integration is S/4 HANA, where integration is enabled with SAP Cloud Integration.
  2. Type of Products supported in this integration are:
    1. Sales
    2. Subscription
    3. Service Contract
  3. Product details that arrive to SAP CPQ from S/4:
    1. Name
    2. System ID
    3. Product Type
    4. Part Number
    5. Unit of Measure
    6. Category
    7. OrderItemType (property with value Sales or Subscription or Service Contract) which can’t be changed via the API or in the application.
  4. ImportMaterialsFromERP SOAP API is used to import the products in CPQ
  5. Set-Up Required in CPQ
    1. Product Types
    2. Product Categories
    3. Billing Cycle
    4. Service Profile
    5. Response Profile
    6. Billing Date
    7. Settlement Period
  6. Change Process scenarios are only supported for Subscription
  7. Products supported
    1. Simple Products             
    2. Configurable
    3. Multi-level/Parent-Child – Bundle, Non-Bundle, CPQ Bundle. BOM Explosion is required.

Products

General Item Category Group Code

Transactional Document Created on S/4 side

Children

Additional Info

Bundle Multi-level Product

Bundle (like a dummy product)

Bundle Parent will not have any follow-on document, as they are like dummy products. The children will have follow-on documents as per their type.

Sales(simple and configurable) Service Contract simple and configurable), Subscription( multi-level),

Mixed Product Type of parent child combination is allowed.e.g. Sales product can have sales, service contract and subscription product as child products

Non- Bundle Multi-level Product

Multi AVC

 

Sales, Subscription, Service Contract

Same type of products should be used as parent -child. e.g. Sales parent can have only sales as child products.

 

Transition Journey for Different Products

Type of Product

Additional Attributes Added during replication to CPQ

Transactional Document Created on S/4 side

Sales

None

Solution Quotation -> Sales Order

Subscription

·       Contract Duration

·       Billing Cycle

Contract Extension Period

Solution Quotation -> Subscription Contract

Service Contract

·       Service Profile

·       Response Profile

·       Billing date

·       Service Contract Duration

Settlement period

Solution Quotation -> Service Contracts


Value Mapping for SAP CPQ Integration with SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management

 

This key mapping for product is Bi-Directional(BD).

Agency

Identifier

Mapping

Agency

Identifier

CPQ

UnitofMeasure

BD

S/4

QuantityUnit

CPQ

OrderItemType

BD

S/4

QuotationItemOrderItemType

CPQ

ConditionCurrency

BD

S/4

ConditionCurrency

CPQ

BundleItemCategory

BD

S/4

Bundle

S/4

IndustrialSectorCode

BD

CPQ

PrimaryIndustry

S/4

ProductHierarchyInternalID

BD

CPQ

ProductCategoryUSEnglish

S/4

ProductTypeCode

BD

CPQ

OrderItemType

S/4

TimeZoneCode

BD

CPQ

TimeZone

S/4

CountryCode

BD

CPQ

Country

S/4

FormOfAddressCode

BD

CPQ

FormOfAddress

S/4

ProductTypeCode_ItemCategoryGroupCode

BD

CPQ

OrderItemType

S/4

RegionCode

BD

CPQ

State

 

Once Set-up is done in all systems – CPQ, CPI and  S/4 HANA, the master data creation can start and products can be replicated from S/4HANA to CPQ. Examples in SAP Help portal can be referred to for further reference on Master Data Creation.

entry.title: Re: Check Table for Custom field created using Custom Fie...
entry.content:
Hi Varun,

do you know how I can achieve the same behavior as a check table?

Example:
I enhance the material master data with a field which has key fields for plant or storage location and some further information to be enhanced.
So my expectation would be a check for e.g. plant or storage location (fields are already given in standard table which is to be enhanced) for filtering the check table entries/codelist.

PLANT (x)
CUSTOMER_SPECIFIC_FIELD

Codelist should be filtered by given plant of material master data like a check table.

I tried it with a CDS View which has a where condition with an importing parameter but this view is not selectable for codelist in Custom Fields app.

I did not found any proposed solution for this problem.

Kind Regards
Tim

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content: Hi @CMezger this is the intended behavior. The configurations used for the legacy search like sort do not apply to the enhanced search. It is not possible to change the sort order.

entry.title: Re: Extensibility Approaches in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
I have a question on Developer Extensibility  for Public Cloud. Its mentioned in the blog that Eclipse could be used for development  . However I also came across OSS  3016104 which says  for Custom CDS view creation only Fiori App " Custom CDS " can be used  and Eclipse is not supported.

Could you please clarify ? If Eclipse can be used on public cloud  then what type of development objects are supported to be developed with eclipse ?

entry.title: Re: Como Consultar Transação Por Role no Perfil de Um Usuário?
entry.content:
Olá Simone, tudo bem?

Então vamos lá:

1. Pergunta: Como ver as transações que o usuário possui?

Aqui poderá ter ver todas as transações que um determinado usuário possui.

2. Como descobrir quais as funções (roles) das transações?

Aqui você pode colocar até 5 transações por vez. E conseguir as funções destas transações.

Boa sorte

entry.title: How to migrate roles and auth from old ECC system to S/4 Hana green field implementation
entry.content:
Hello All,

 

We have master and derived roles concept in our old ecc system. We need to migrate the roles and auth to new S/4 HANA greenfiled implemnetation. There are lots of master and derived roles in the ECC systems which we require to migrate in new S/4 Hana system. How can we migrate roles and auth from old ECC system to S/4 Hana with greenfield approach

Regards,

Saurav

entry.title: Hide Ability to Create New Job Req From Specific Template But Not From Position Org Chart

We don't want to inactivate the Template entirely because we want them to be creating these kinds of Reqs from the Position Org Chart, but to only be creating them from the Position Org Chart. Is this possible?

entry.title: How to migrate data with CDS view behaviour LTMOM
entry.content:
Hello,

can someone please explain to me how I can migrate data with CDS view behaviours? I can't find anything online for this topic. I created an migrationobject over LTMOM and chose A_BANK_3 as CDS view behaviour. I've created a short sourcestructure with only the keyfields and mapped to the A_BANK_3 view for testing. I did download the template file and filled some testing values. But now i'm stuck. Whats the next step? How can I simulate data? Maybe somone could give me a step by step guide on how to use this method correctly. Thank you very much.

 

Greetings Alex

entry.title: Re: I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - P...

entry.title: B4HANA SQL Script Execution
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have the B4HANA system and given below are the detail, 

DW4CORE 200 0014 SAPK-20014INDW4CORE DATA Warehouse

Here i need to test some SQL Script and i am able to do it from DB02, but would like to know if there is any other way other than DB02 as this t-code or the "dbcockpit" tcode is not allowed in PRD B4HANA system. In such case we need the "SQL Editor" in PRD to test few scipts.

entry.title: Re: how can i pass a dyanamic data to content of cms rotating banner image component
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions. Hopefully someone will fix it for you.

entry.title: Re: How to create OData Services with Mobile Application Integration Framework (MAIF)

entry.title: Re: Question on Just Ask
entry.content:
Hi Vish,
Thanks for sharing !
Looking at your examples, and assuming the underlying model contrains APAC as a dimension value and product as dimension. Just ask shoud answer these correctly. 

You can check the type of questions supported by just ask (as of august 2024). I've posted in a comment the this blog post.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/initial-release-of-sap-analytics-cloud-just-ask/bc-p/13697890#M172377
Also if you haven't yet, try selected the model before asking the question. And finally  I see supernumerary 'for'  in the question:  "for for 2023" and "for by product", have you tried without these ?

entry.title: Re: Padding is invalid and cannot be removed
entry.content:
Need more details about when you are getting this error, it's not a CR error so look to be something you are doing in your code or configuration settings.

A quick Google search found this:

https://stackoverflow.com/questions/8583112/padding-is-invalid-and-cannot-be-removed

entry.title: Re: Control who appears in org chart
entry.content:
Hi - thanks for your response. My question was geared more towards org chart bout getting them in SF:

Will they show up in org chart or can we hide them? We have managers who have over 20 non- payroll temps so we would not want to clutter org chat.

and f they will show up in org chart, can we customize to differentiate them maybe with color tile or a filter on the org chart page to filter on employee type?

entry.title: Viewing customer failed in Support Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

for a customer of my organization, we are unable to view it in the list of customers in order to open an incident or request a license.

Viewing customer failed in Support Launchpad, but in the list of On-Premise Active Sales Contracts result active

All our users are enabled and have permissions to access for these features.

Has anyone ever had this kind of issue?

thanks to anyone who can help me.

entry.title: How to release a retention payment during Payment Run
entry.content: We are trying to set up Retention Payments in SAP. We have gone all the way through the MIRO and everything looks correct. Let's say the PO IR amount is 100 and 10 of that is held for retention. When we invoice for the 100, 10 gets held as expected. Payment run executes and invoices 90. Question is how do we trigger the invoicing/payment run to pick up the remaining 10?

entry.title: Re: Control who appears in org chart
entry.content: you said you implemented something similar - is it working as expected? we were going to use IAS and user connector to LMS but we may want them on bizX side. Do you have them on bizX side showing in org chart?

entry.title: Kickstart your SAP Signavio Process Intelligence adoption with our new Adoption Starter e-learning
entry.content:
Hello SAP Signavio community,

SAP Signavio Value Map team is excited to announce that we have released our new SAP Signavio Process Intelligence E-Learning from the SAP Signavio Adoption Starter series.

What is the session about?

Dive into the essentials of SAP Signavio Process Intelligence with this e-learning course designed to accelerate your understanding and adoption. Learn to navigate the platform, utilize data transformation templates, leverage standard metrics, and build insightful dashboards. Empower your organization with data-driven insights and streamline your process analysis efforts. Perfect for business analysts, process managers, and IT professionals seeking to enhance decision-making and operational efficiency.

What are the session goals?

  • Learn how to set up SAP Signavio Process Intelligence
  • Understand process mining concept
  • Understand how to connect and load data - Understand the Accelerators

How to get in?

If you haven't yet signed up for the SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps, don't worry, we've got you covered! Get started with SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps here. (Check out our step-by-step instructional video  on how to join SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value maps.)

Direct link to the new E-Learning session:

SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Intelligence

Do you need any additional help?

Don't hesitate to get in touch with our team using the following form. (Please select the "SAP Signavio | Business Process Transformation" topic).

Happy learning!

There is no specific mention of that data source in CR's platform:

https://www.sap.com/documents/2016/06/f871031e-757c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

If you can create a ODBC/OLE dB connection to it it should work in CR

After Coming to Customer BS_CU_OVP, same Customizing getting reflected even I didn't create for customer OVP


Thanks, 

Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: CAP: View for entity not generated in subscribed tenants
entry.content:
Hello,

we developed a CAP Java Springboot app deployed to BTP CF space with Hana DB. The app uses multi-tenancy.  A tenant is already subscribed to this app in the test space. 

On database layer we already created some time ago a database table "RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults". This database table is visible in the Hana schema of the subscribed tenant. 

We now want to create a new entity in our service.cds file referencing that db table ( the last line is new)

using com.sap.apm.rules.eiot as apm from '../db/data-model';

@path: '/RuleExecutionsService/v1'
service RuleExecutionsService @(restrict: [{ grant: 'READ', to:  ['Rules_C','Rules_R','Rules_U','Rules_D'] }]){
   @readonly entity RuleExecutions as projection on apm.RuleExecutions;
   @readonly entity RuleExecutionTechnicalObjects as projection on apm.RuleExecutionTechnicalObjects;
   @readonly entity RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectMonitoringResults as projection on apm.RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectMonitoringResults;
   @readonly entity RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults as projection on apm.RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults;
}

We see that in the generated schema-hana.sql file a new create view statement is generated for the new entity: 

CREATE VIEW RuleExecutionsService_RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults AS SELECT
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.ID,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.technicalObject_ID,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.indicator_ssid,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.indicator_characteristicsInternalId,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.indicator_positionId,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.indicator_categoryName,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0."TIMESTAMP",
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.value,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.error_code,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.error_message
FROM com_sap_apm_rules_eiot_RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults AS RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0
WITH ASSOCIATIONS (
  MANY TO ONE JOIN RuleExecutionsService_RuleExecutionTechnicalObjects AS technicalObject ON (technicalObject.ID = technicalObject_ID)
);

 Our expectation is that when we deploy the app to the CF space the database schemas for all subscribed tenants get automatically updated and this view is available afterwards in those schemas. 

However, this does not happen. 

Question: What do we have to do ensure that the view appears in all Hana schemas of the subscribed tenants?

=====

@cap-js/asyncapi: 1.0.1
@cap-js/cds-types: 0.2.0
@cap-js/openapi: 1.0.4
@cap-js/sqlite: 1.7.3
@Sap/cds: 8.0.4
@Sap/cds-compiler: 5.0.6
@Sap/cds-dk: 8.0.2
@Sap/cds-dk (global): 7.9.2
@Sap/cds-fiori: 1.2.3
@Sap/cds-foss: 5.0.0
@Sap/cds-hana: 2.0.0
@Sap/cds-mtxs: 2.0.3
@Sap/eslint-plugin-cds: 3.0.4
Node.js: v18.18.2
apm-rules-eiot-cds: 1.0.0
home: https://github.tools.sap/AssetPerformanceManagement/apm-rules-eiot
CAP Java SDK: 3.0.0
cds4j: 3.0.0
Spring Boot: 3.3.3
Maven: 3.9.5, home: /Users/D038325/Library/apache-maven-3.9.5
Java: 21.0.2, home: /Users/D038325/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/sapmachine-jdk-21.0.2.jdk/Contents/Home
OS: Mac OS X, 14.6.1, arch: x86_64

entry.title: How do I pass the raw data as content for Attachment API_DOCUMENT_SRV
entry.content:
I have a requirement for an application I've developed where, upon clicking an attachment, the camera opens, allowing the user to take a picture and send it to the SAP S4 system. The issue arises when sending the data to SAP: although I'm passing it in Base64 format and it is stored correctly against the document number attachments, attempting to open the file results in a "file not supported" error.

our landscape application developed in Neptune open edition-->goes through API suite to S4

entry.title: Re: Control who appears in org chart
entry.content: Hi Gi, this may not solve the issue, but we do have our contractors in SF with a BizX profile. We used to use full contingent profiles, but we then moved to Fieldglass. The only way I found to hide was mark the profiles as Is Contingent = Yes, and then exclude them in the org chart. The problem is that it looks like the exclude contingent option goes with the new org chart. There is an enhancement request in, but I don't know if they will be able to do anything. Definitely an issue for us too

entry.title: Re: ABAP News for Release 7.40 - Constructor Operator EXACT
entry.content:
When I use EXACT #( 'Hello World'(001) ). wherein (001) has a translation in lang DE.
Now I logon with 'DE' 
the result is : 'Hello World'
But if I try:
   CONV #( 'Hello World'(001) ).

or

EXACT #( TEXT-001 ).

Result is : Hallo Welt

Does EXACT not support translations with Literal(idf) syntax?

entry.title: Updating Concur Approver with User Provisioning Service API
entry.content:
SAP Concur's User Provisioning Service (UPS) API is a powerful tool for creating and maintaining your company's user profiles within SAP Concur.  More information about this API can be found in this introductory blog or searching for the tag SAP Concur Technical Consulting.

This post focuses on maintaining approver records via the UPS API.  Approvers are one of the most frequently updated fields in the Concur system and there are multiple dependencies to be aware of to successfully make your updates.   I have outlined these key points below. 

 

Within the User Provisioning Service schema you will find several attributes with a 'manager' or 'approver' label.  They are listed here for reference.

  • Enterprise:manager - for future use.  Can be left NULL.
  • SpendApprover:approver
  • Report
  • cashAdvance
  • request
  • invoice
  • purchaseRequest
  • statement
  • budget
  • Travel:manager

These attributes are found in different extensions and apply to specific features within SAP Concur.  Only the ones that are pertinent to your site's configuration and to the user should be populated.

A request to update an Expense approver looks like this.

 

PATCH https://{datacenterURI}/profile/v4/Users/<ConcurUUID>
{
    "schemas": [
        "urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:PatchOp"
    ],
    "Operations": [
        {
                "op": "replace",
                "value":{                  "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:spend:2.0:Approver":{
                    "report": [
                    {
                        "approver": {  //1 of the 3 attributes below//
                            "value": "approverUUID"
                           "displayName": "test.employee@sap.com"
                            "employeeNumber": "37480"
                        },
                        "primary": true
                    }
                ]
               }
            }
         }
    ]
}

 

 

 

 

Key Things to Know

General

  •  A user that will be approving must have the appropriate approver role before they can be successfully assigned as an approver.

Example of an Expense Approver role assignment

 

 "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:spend:2.0:Role": {
        "roles": [
            {
                "roleName": "EXP_APPROVER",
                "roleGroups": []
            }
        ]
    },

 

 

 

  • The Concur UUID is required for the user being updated.  The Concur UUID can be found with the following GET.

GET https://{datacenterURI}/profile/identity/v4.1/Users?attributes=XXX

Returns   …. "id": "8f545a90-305f-441b-91cd-a69ad5f548f5",….

  • The response status represents whether the request itself was received successfully.  It does not reflect the status of the operations in the request.  The provisioning statusURL contains the details and status of request operations.  For example, a request to update a spend:Approver is sent.  Initial response is 200.  Provisioning status is Failed.  This means that "Yes, we received your spend:Approver request and it was formatted correctly.  No, we weren't able to actually do what you asked."  You can add ‘?attributes=operations’ to the provisionStatus URL for additional data.

 "statusUrl": "https://{datacenterURI}/profile/v4/provisions/e820c001-c358-4a3e-964a-321dc2a76203/status",

 

Approvers Assigned to a User

  • When updating an approver, ALL other approvers in that extension must be valid or NULL.  For example, if your site is using Expense and Invoice and the user has an approver assigned for both, changing the Expense approver will fail if the Invoice approver is no longer a valid approver.  (No longer has the Invoice approver role or is Inactive.)  Both would need to be modified in the same call.  The Invoice approver in this example can either be deleted or updated to a valid Invoice Approver.

 

  • The UI will not display an approver if that approver is not active.  It will appear that none is assigned.  The best way to verify what approvers are currently assigned before updating is to do a GET on the user and evaluate both the Expense and Invoice approver attributes first.

Example of a GET on a specific user

 

GET https://{datacenterURI}/profile/identity/v4.1/Users/ef0bffaf-863f-4b3e-9c4c-bd9c9a8b2ea7

 …   "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:spend:2.0:Approver": {
        "report": [
            {
                "approver": {
                    "value": "7a183cbe-1f4a-44f4-891c-8eff3608975e"
                },
                "primary": true
            }
        ]
        ...
        "budget": [
            {
                "approver": {
                    "value": "7a183cbe-1f4a-44f4-891c-8eff3608975e"
                },
                "primary": true
            }
        ]
    }
….

 

 

  • Some sites automatically add the assign the Expense approver as the Travel approver.  When an Expense approver is created or updated via UPS, this setting is not evaluated.  The Travel approver will not automatically be populated.  A specific request must be sent to populate the Travel approver.

Example of a Travel Manager Update

 

	PATCH https://{datacenterURI}/profile/v4/Users/<ConcurUUID>
	{
	    "schemas": [
	        "urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:PatchOp"
	    ],
	    "Operations": [
	        {
	                "op": "replace",
	                "value":{
	                    "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:travel:2.0:User":{
	                    "manager": {
	            	        "employeeNumber": "37480"
	                             }
	               }
	            }
	         }
	    ]
	}

 

 

 

Timely updates to users' assigned approvers will ensure accurate and up-to-date routing of their expense reports.  Do you have any tips to share regarding approver assignments?  Please add them to the comments below.

entry.title: Re: Automatic packing of EWM Outbound delivery based on Packing Instructions (UPB)
entry.content:
Very helpful explanation! Thanks a lot.

If I may, I would like to add that I also tested with EWM Pack Spec, and it works correctly.

However, when I tested with multi-level Pack Spec (Subordinate), it didn’t work. I suppose the standard SAP doesn't cover the multi-level Pack Spec scenario.

entry.title: Re: Custom data as table, CDS, Domain, Business object and all that jazz...
entry.content:
Hi 

As mentioned that i can not use CDS view created using custom business object in developer extensibility. I am not getting exactly how it will replace SM30. Using SM30 , you can maintain your table data but you also want to use that table in code using select , if i want to read this Custom business object data in My custom restful abap programming model application for some logic . How i can do so? just to mention i am working on S/4 HANA PUBLIC EDITION . I have requirement to have SM30 like table which in which user can maintain data. same can be used in developer extensibility Logic. I found business object but now i am also facing same issue using it in my logic as a select or in another CDS. 

Thanks 

Amit Gupta

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
entry.content: My Solution for Task 4:

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
entry.content: here is

entry.title: How to configure Integration using BRF+ for Purchase Orders via EDI (Ariba Network and S/4 HANA)
entry.content:
This procedure aims to demonstrate how to configure end-to-end transactions to ensure that an IDoc is triggered during the Purchase Order process - Integration between S/4 HANA and Ariba Network using BRF+.

This guide assumes that all the mandatory steps for the integration between S/4 and CIG have already been completed.

Please also check relevant SAP Notes & Links regarding BRF+ and its restrictions. Following are some relevant ones:

  • SAP Note 3316965
  • SAP Note 2228611
  • BRFplus Output Management | SAP Help Portal

The initial steps are performed in SPRO, following the common path:

SPRO > Cross-Application Components à Output Control (…)

  • (…) > Define Output Types
    • Create a new entry, as an example bellow
  • (…) Assign Output Channels
    • Create the entries for the Output Type created in step 1 – IDOC and EDI:
  • (…) Assign Form Templates
    • Create the Form Template ID and assign it to the PURCHASE_ORDER process:

The next actions are going to be performed in BRF+, via transaction OPD for process Purchase Order:

  • Determination Step: Output Type
    • In column “Document Type”, insert all Purchase Order Types that are relevant for the Ariba Output.
    • In column “Output Type” insert the output configured in Step 1 of SPRO.
  • Determination Step: Receiver
    • Create an entry for the Output Type configured in Step 1 of SPRO, with role LF-Vendor assigned.
  • Determination Step: Channel
    • Create an entry for the Output Type configured in Step 1 of SPRO, with IDOC channel assigned.

The next actions are going to be performed in WE20, aiming to establish the Vendors relevant for Ariba output.

  • Under Partner Type “LI”, create a new entry as follows:
  • Insert a new entry in Outbound and configure the output ARBCIG_ORDERS normally – as indicated in guide. Below is an example of the expected result:

If the Message Type is not 'NEU', an additional step is required for the customizations to work.

Since “NEU” is the entry expected by the standard in class CL_MM_PUR_PO_OUTPUT_CALLBACK (configured in step 1 of SPRO), when other message types are relevant for the customer, it’s important to perform the following steps:

  • Copy class CL_MM_PUR_PO_OUTPUT_CALLBACK to a custom one. Example: ZCL_MM_PUR_PO_OUTPUT_CALLBACK;
  • Edit method IF_APOC_COMMON_API~GET_LEGACY_DATA and replace ‘NEU’ for the Message Type desired (example ‘ZNEU’);

Class CL_MM_PUR_PO_OUTPUT_CALLBACK:

Class ZCL_MM_PUR_PO_OUTPUT_CALLBACK:

Save and activate.

  • If errors occur, replace each instance of CL_MM_PUR_PO_OUTPUT_CALLBACK with ZCL_MM_PUR_PO_OUTPUT_CALLBACK.
  • After making these changes, the class should activated properly.
  • In step 1 of SPRO configuration, replace the class CL_MM_PUR_PO_OUTPUT_CALLBACK by ZCL_MM_PUR_PO_OUTPUT_CALLBACK:

Create a Purchase Order that aligns with all the above configurations and the integration should work. You will, then, be able to verify the Purchase Order in the Commerce Automation platform. 

Please also check logs in S/4 HANA (WE05 - IDOC), CIG and Ariba Network.

I hope it helps you all!

entry.title: How to create accessible PDF's from Crystal Reports 13.0.4000
entry.content:
Currently using Crystal Reports 13.0.4000 and need to understand what is required to produce PDFs in a WCAG 2.x format for a11y compliance. Our output is mostly forms and tables that need to be readable using screen reader. 

SAP Crystal Reports

entry.title: Re: ECP - SAPS4 integration for payroll posting
entry.content:
Hi,

have you found a solution for your question? We are facing the exact same issue.

Thanks and regards,
Jens

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Cloud: Grouping DATE values by MONTH from linked dimensions in charts
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

I have a question about the capabilities of SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Cloud to group DATE values from two linked data sources (linked dimensions) by MONTH (while also showing unbooked values) in a chart.

So for example, let's say I have the creation dates and EUR values of sales quotations (AG) and a sales orders (TA) in two separate Custom Analytical Queries. 

(I know you can usually get this data from a single CDS view, but for the sake of example, let's say you have two data sources).

 

This would be my sample input data:

And this is the kind of chart that I want to create in with SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Cloud:

This is what I am currently able to create. It is close, but it still lacks the grouping by month:

The creation date dimensions are linked for sales quotation and sales order, and unbooked data is displayed:

 

Unfortunately, when I try to group dates by month/year, I get the error "Failed to fetch data".

 

I guess the grouping can usually be done by changing the hierarchy from "flat presentation" to "year-month-day" and then setting the level to month. 

But something about having linked date dimensions seems to interfere.

Is there a way to make this work?

 

Thanks in advance.

 

Best Regards,

Simon

entry.title: CDS Views for Price Simulation of Customer/Material Combination in sales SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi team,

As per the requirement by Business,I wanted to create a report for a pricing simulation of sales order where price is maintained on Customer/Material Combination with Discount and Tax value.Please suggest a solution where I can fetch data in the form of report.

Also,kindly suggest a CDS View if available as its a priority kindly help 

Regards 

Dhanush

entry.title: Tree Table not getting refreshed from Javascript
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a Tree Table (sap.ui.table.TreeTable) where there's a column having Input field. Binding is correct and data is displayed perfectly. However, when I change a value in Input and then I have a button to refresh the data again.
DefaultBindingMode is TwoWay.

var oTreeTable = this.byId("treeTable");
oTreeTable.getBinding("rows").refresh(true);

For example if I changed a value from "1" to "2" and then I click refresh button then the above code will be executed and it should reset the changes which I made on screen. Which is the "2" should become "1". I'm not if this is correct approach. But the refresh is not happening. There's no error in console and the data is also fetched from backend but it is not updated in frontend.

Here's my app's screenshot, I have changed the second last row value from "1" to "2". Network logs are also attached 

Any help is appreciated.

entry.title: Re: CAP: View for entity not generated in subscribed tenants
entry.content: You have update the subscription for each tenant. You can do this from BTP Cockpit in subscriber subaccount or Subscription Management Dashboard in provider subaccount. You could also use REST APIs from mtxs for Deployment service (upgrade) or tools built on top.

entry.title: Re: Configuring Different setting for the Same Asset Clas...
entry.content:
Dear @filmocha ,

thank you for your question. You may have noticed that it took us a while to respond, the reason being, with the scarce set of data provided it might be rather difficult to gauge an angle to get a good perspective. Let me try this: 

  • Please check user authorizations / profiles for the user(s) managing the assets for different company codes
  • Please check if users with higher authority / different authorization might be able to assign / open the field status for the respective application field(s).
  • Please check the SAP Help documentation at help.sap.com, scope item documentation and KBAs in SAP for Me at me.sap.com.
  • Did you investigate / do you have in scope, items
    • 5HG, Asset Accounting, Additional Depreciation Area
    • 1IH, Intercompany Asset Transfer Within Same Country
    • 4ON, mass processing of assets?
  • Have the initial (master) data been imported via data migration? Might there be a way to update them in the same ways? Perhaps check the Business Accelerator Hub for suitable APIs, too.
  • If any of this gets you closer to a solution please share the solution you found to work well in the comments and mark this response accordingly. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Extending a Standard API - A Guide to Enhancing API_QUALITYNOTIFICATION
entry.content: Nice post. Can you please share the end to end business scenario ? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Integration Center demo for the Compensation Module
entry.content:
@ashfak022 yes, see here:

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/how-to-use-performance-ratings-in-compensation-eligibility-rules/ba-p/13536651

entry.title: Re: Custom apps displayed as blank page in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi @2024_Hanami, thank you for your question.

In steps 10 and 11 of the note, please double-check the Business Catalog(s) you assigned.

Does the user testing the app have those catalogs assigned to themselves?

Did you test this in a different browser or in incognito mode / InPrivate window, or clearing the cache?

Did you have another user with the correct authorization test in their browser? 

Which of the parameters mentioned in the SAP Help the note refers to did you test out in addition to expertMode?

If these hints get you any closer to a resolution, please mark this answer accordingly. Also, please share your actual solution in an answer or comment as well. Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Build apps action. Can't read JSON from API
entry.content:
When running a test on an action in SAP Build I get the following error.

{
"code": 12000,
"message": "Execution of action failed",
"correlationId": "27932dd7-91bf-4fe8-4402-19710945fc43",
"details": [
{ "code": 12000,
"message": "Failed to create action output for action get and response code 200: Cannot convert undefined or null to object",
"severity": "ERROR"
}
]

[
  {
    "description": "xxxxx",
    "metadata": {
      " below_unit": " -",
      " global_trade_item_number": 186,
      " in_unit": " -",
      " lead_time": 15,
      " max_energy_consumption": " -",
      " max_flow": 0,
      " max_rec_head": 0,
      " name": " Condenser Cleaner 600ml Box Lbl",
      " remotely": " -",
      " site_id": " BR1000",
      " sound_db": 0,
      " suction_lift": 0,
      " system_type": " -",
      " trunking": " -",
      "product_id": "6755",
      "score": 0.8306616847524148
    },
    "similarity_score": 0.8306616847524148
  },
  {
    "description": "xxxxxx",
    "metadata": {
      " below_unit": " -",
      " global_trade_item_number": 185,
      " in_unit": " -",
      " lead_time": 15,
      " max_energy_consumption": " -",
      " max_flow": 0,
      " max_rec_head": 0,
      " name": " Condenser Cleaner 1L Box Lbl",
      " remotely": " -",
      " site_id": " BR1000",
      " sound_db": 0,
      " suction_lift": 0,
      " system_type": " -",
      " trunking": " -",
      "product_id": "6725",
      "score": 0.823491177142724
    },
    "similarity_score": 0.823491177142724
  },
  {
    "description": "xxxxx",
    "metadata": {
      " below_unit": " -",
      " global_trade_item_number": 184,
      " in_unit": " -",
      " lead_time": 15,
      " max_energy_consumption": " -",
      " max_flow": 0,
      " max_rec_head": 0,
      " name": " Condenser Cleaner Conc 1L Box Lbl",
      " remotely": " -",
      " site_id": " BR1000",
      " sound_db": 0,
      " suction_lift": 0,
      " system_type": " -",
      " trunking": " -",
      "product_id": "6695",
      "score": 0.8102495639772882
    },
    "similarity_score": 0.8102495639772882
  },
  {
    "description": "xxxxx",
    "metadata": {
      " below_unit": " -",
      " global_trade_item_number": 187,
      " in_unit": " -",
      " lead_time": 15,
      " max_energy_consumption": " -",
      " max_flow": 0,
      " max_rec_head": 0,
      " name": " Universal Coil Cleaner Conc 1L Box Lbl",
      " remotely": " -",
      " site_id": " BR1000",
      " sound_db": 0,
      " suction_lift": 0,
      " system_type": " -",
      " trunking": " -",
      "product_id": "6785",
      "score": 0.8033885945712105
    },
    "similarity_score": 0.8033885945712105
  },
  {
    "description": "xxxxxx",
    "metadata": {
      " below_unit": " -",
      " global_trade_item_number": 139,
      " in_unit": " -",
      " lead_time": 15,
      " max_energy_consumption": " -",
      " max_flow": 0,
      " max_rec_head": 0,
      " name": " Conden Clean & Degr 600ml Label ES REV2",
      " remotely": " -",
      " site_id": " BR1000",
      " sound_db": 0,
      " suction_lift": 0,
      " system_type": " -",
      " trunking": " -",
      "product_id": "7060",
      "score": 0.7943730599435553
    },
    "similarity_score": 0.7943730599435553
  }
]

The body of the reponse also converts the whole the payload into a string.

The above works fine when creating a data integration in SAP Build apps.

Also, simpler JSON seems to work fine in a SAP Build Action.

[
    {
        "xxx",
        "product_id": null,
        "product_name": null,
        "similarity_score": 0.8306556940078735
    },
    {
        "xxx",
        "product_id": null,
        "product_name": null,
        "similarity_score": 0.823538373497823
    },
    {
        "xxxxx",
        "product_id": null,
        "product_name": null,
        "similarity_score": 0.8102967256130754
    },
    {
        "product_description": "xxxx",
        "product_id": null,
        "product_name": null,
        "similarity_score": 0.8034826272459229
    }
]

Please advise as our API needs to be called from a SAP Build Action (to be used in a process automation), a SAP Build app or anywhere else.

entry.title: Re: Which website is the best to learn a SAPUI5 javascrip...
entry.content:
I also agree there's no javascript specific for SAPUI5.

In my case, in order to work on SAPUI5 apps, I first had to take a full training course. I took the course "The Complete JavaScript Course 2024: From Zero to Expert" from Udemy, which is the best course I've every taken in my life. The bad news is that it's a 68 hour video.

entry.title: Re: Datasphere model metadata in Just Ask
entry.content: Hi deshmukh

entry.title: Re: Datasphere model metadata in Just Ask
entry.content:
Hi Deshmukh,

SAP Dataphere  support by just ask is a key focus for the product team. We arcknoledge of the current limitations including the time it takes to provide model metadata .
The team is working addressing this; first - planned in Q4 release - by enabling administrator to add SAP Datasphere models. Second, planned next year to implement server side indexing and get feature parity with acquired data models.

Thanks,

François

entry.title: Re: Integration Center demo for the Compensation Module
entry.content: @xavierlegarrec This is from Background element/EP portlet to MDF object IC job, we wanted to integrate directly from PM Form to MDF object so that we could pull the data when the form is in Progress step as well. Is this possible.

entry.title: Re: Get SEGW project from V4 Odata service - API_WAREHOUS...
entry.content:
API_WAREHOUSE_RESOURCE is not an SEGW service, but a Service Binding.

Service Binding are the "new" type of Odata Services in ABAP Restful Application Programming.

entry.title: Re: Communication over HTTPS. I/O error occurred at getting input or output stream of socket.
entry.content: Good afternoon. I have the same problem. Could you give me more details on how to resolve the problem?

entry.title: Re: Which website is the best to learn a SAPUI5 javascrip...
entry.content:
thanks i will try that training 

question

is the javascript training you watched , has similar syntax in sap ui5?  The javascript training I watched in youtube has different syntax in SAPUI5

entry.title: Re: Retention Process Configuration & its Process Flow
entry.content: We're still struggling on finding documentation on how we can release the Retention amount to the Vendor. Nowhere do I see where this is explained.

entry.title: Re: Integration Center demo for the Compensation Module
entry.content:
@ashfak022 

directly from PM to MDF no, but the workaround to go through the profile works with in-progress forms as well.

entry.title: Re: How do I pass the raw data as content for Attachment...
entry.content:
Thank you for your question, @VijayDaniel.

You might prefer for the user to take a picture in a BTP web app or even simply use their mobile phone to send the picture to your app's storage space using any of the built-in transmission capabilities. That way you could focus on storing the image in a suitable corporate file folder (a private cloud file store?) and send a hyperlink from there to the proper space in S/4 from where users with respective authorization can access the image file in the folder when clicking on the attachment icon. 

The SAP system itself does not make for a proper file system for storing images. That is not its purpose and design. It might do a poor job and yet be rather expensive for the amount of data. When you do your research you might find proper (online, private) data storage fit for purpose at a fraction of the cost. 

If this addresses the core of your question, please mark the response accordingly. Thank you.

entry.title: Prevent billing doc creation when vbrk & vbrp records are available based on a condition
entry.content:
We are looking to stop billing document creation for a delivery after checking VBRK-NETWR and VBRP-NETWR (so we need XVBRK, XVBRP and XKOMV internal tables to be populated for our requirement), if condition is not satisfied stop billing doc creation in VF06 / VF04 / VF01.

We tried couple of user exits but nothing was helpful to stop the billing document creation.

Could you please recommend a condition/setting to stop the billing document creation if condition is not met  and which user exit would be  an appropriate place to handle it ?

entry.title: Re: Integration Center demo for the Compensation Module
entry.content:
@ashfak022 

You need to have this checked in provisioning > Company settings

entry.title: Cannot create Source List without PIR via Migration cockpit
entry.content: Message 06341: "Info record for vendor & and material & does not exist" is set to W and there is no error if created manually using ME01, but while migrating from Fiori (data migration) the error is thrown.

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba Integration with S/4HANA Public Cloud for B...
entry.content:
Thank you for your question, @MDThouheed.

For SAP Ariba integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition please refer to the respective scope items in SAP for Me, process navigator at Process Navigator - SAP for Me. 

 

The Ariba integration scope items with their accelerators provide all the information, diagrams and configuration you need. 

If this answers your question, please mark this response accordingly. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to obtain my S4HC APIKey
entry.content:
Thank you and congratulations for answering your own question, @peter_munt4! 

Here is what I found on obtaining and managing API keys: 

    • Trying Out APIs in a Sandbox Environment | SAP Help Portal
    • Trying Out APIs in a Configured Environment | SAP Help Portal

The latter contains some information om OAuth v API Key. They appear to be alternative ways to authenticate:  

 

 

When you're finding your own answers, please share them by replying to your own post with an answer and mark that answer as resolving your question. This way, the only somewhat smart (AI, yes, there, I said it) algorithms will recognize your answer as such and suggest your response to other community members who might be looking for a clue about the API key. Thank you for being such a good sport, Peter!

entry.title: Re: Implementing SAP GRC 12.0 Fiori Apps - Overview
entry.content: Can you guide how to create this setup in Embedded Fiori GRC system

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
entry.content:
Here is my solution for Week 4

1. List Page with Criticality

2.Object page displaying the details of Travel

Thanks,

Nikhilesh

entry.title: JCDS and JEST Table partition
entry.content:
We are going to perform Table partition for JCDS & JEST contains 1907640720 records in PR0 system, need suggestion how to perform 2 partitions with below scenario 

we cannot reduce the data.  So what we need to do is follow this. Partition by the value in the INACT column – all records with INACT = ‘X’ in one partition, and the rest in another partition.  The records without INACT=’X’ can be loaded in memory, but the others should stay on disk only. 

And also suggest which partition is suitable.

entry.title: Re: Agent type missing in task creation related to Process route item
entry.content: Same issue, was a service or solution found?

entry.title: Re: JCDS and JEST Table partition
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions. Hopefully someone will fix it for you.

entry.title: Email for Contact Person list uibb
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a scenario as below and request to guide me on the same.

User is trying to create the CR for the MDG-C.

We have custom list uibb for contact person inturn it is allowed to feed the details in the form uibb.

In the form uibb, we add the email id and when we navigate to list uibb, the email id value disappears.

Request to guide me on the same.

Option tried as below.

1. We have checked the feeder class of the list uibb IF_FPM_GUIBB_LIST~GET_DATA, email flows in the CT_DATA but not appearing in the list uibb

Attached the screens for form and list uibb, request to guide me on the same. Thanks.

2. We have checked the value of ev_data_changed  which is true.

3. Feeder class is created on top of super class CL_BS_BP_GUIBB_RELATIONS

form uibb :

list uibb :

 

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: Mass deployment of sap GUI Java
entry.content:
Hi We need to make a mass deployment of sap GUI Java (7.80) for all Mac user of company.

We have a tools of distribution of software but the administrator does not know how to configuring for SAP GUI Java 7.80.

What is the line command that we need to use?

Thanks.

Gabriel.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG: HANA Search making default for both Customer...
entry.content: Why don't you try communicator settings for the page, it is possible to customize that to remove any options which are not required or even default a particular search method

entry.title: Re: mass add BP role in existing BP
entry.content:
Thank you for your question, @Haily.

You may want to try out this SAP Fiori app, for master data specialists: 
Master Data Governance, Mass Processing (Version 2): SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library (ondemand.com).

With this app you can update multiple master data records at a time. The function is available for the product and business partner (including customer and vendor). You can also process business partner relationships. To update records, you select the fields and records you want to change. The system then displays a list of fields to change based on your selection. Once you enter your changes, the system provides statistics on the changed fields and validates the data. You check the validated data and then activate it. Activation copies the data from the staging area to active memory, enabling the system to use it in business transactions.

 
Key Features

  • You can use the file upload feature to upload changes to business objects in .CSV or Office Open XML format (using a semi-colon as a delimiter).

  • The system executes processing in the background, enabling users to close the application and check the status later. You can also save a Mass Processing run and come back to work on it later.

If this helps you get your customer master data in tip top shape, please mark the response accordingly. 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to expose custom fields of Quality Notifications...
entry.content:
Hi,

While the whole tutorial probably doesn't apply in this case, can you try to create a data definition with the provider contract as transactional_query and then try to use that in the service definition and binding. This should work.

Blog - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/s4hc-abap-environment-create-custom-api.html 

Regards,

Dennis

entry.title: Re: import to model ended unexpectedly: Error code: 5021
entry.content: When selecting the run import option, go to change settings and check if the "Update Local Dimensions with New Members" option is unchecked, here I had the same problem when this option was checked, when I disabled it it worked correctly!

entry.title: Re: 如何剔除CDS中的不活动的数据
entry.content:
Thank you for your question, @yiqiangWang.

I will respond in English as I had you question machine-translated to English like follows:

How to Lift Inactive Data in CDS
ES system) I customized a CDS, but there are two data (price data) in this CDS. According to feedback, one of these two data should be inactive, but there are still records in CDS. As a result of the fact that I have this CDS as a data table, the displayed data is doubled. Q. How do I remove data that exists in CDS that may not actually be active in the price data base table? 

With the image provided I conclude, it is not a duplication of line items but of columns you are concerned about, right? Because the line items show different values, therefore it is correct for the view to show different entries in the list.

  • As an end user, you can always filter for data you don't want to consider using the filters on the UI.
  • As a developer, you can exclude values by filtering with a narrower select statement over the same data entity. 

As I understand the table columns YY1_SD_21 and _22 as duplicative it should be in your power to eliminate one of them from this custom CDS View.     

if this helped, please mark the answer accordingly. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: import to model ended unexpectedly: Error code: 5021
